batch-translate.dialog.translate.title: Start batch translation
batch-translate.dialog.cancel.title: Cancel batch translation
batch-translate.dialog.pause.title: Pause batch translation
batch-translate.dialog.resume.title: Resume batch translation
batch-translate.dialog.translate.content: Translate all entities from one locale to another that do not yet have this specific localization
batch-translate.dialog.cancel.content: Cancel translating these entities. You will need to start a new job to continue.
batch-translate.dialog.pause.content: Pause translating these entities. You may continue the translation at any point in time.
batch-translate.dialog.translate.autoPub: Control the publish status of translated entities
usage.title: API usage
usage.estimatedUsage: This action is expected to increase your API usage by:
usage.estimatedUsageExceedsQuota: This action is expected to exceed your API Quota
batch-translate.tier.label: Tier {tier}
batch-translate.tier.0.description: No localized relation dependencies — translate these first
batch-translate.tier.n.description: Depends on types in tiers 0 through {maxTier}
batch-translate.tier.circular.label: Circular Dependencies
batch-translate.tier.circular.descriptio: These content types reference each other. You may need to translate them multiple times for all relations to resolve.
settings.title: Configuration
settings.subtitle: Configure translation provider options. Values set here override environment variables.
settings.provider.label: Provider
settings.provider.hint: Change in config/plugins.js — cannot be changed from the UI
settings.apiKey.label: API Key
settings.apiKey.hint: Overrides the environment variable. Leave unchanged to keep current value.
settings.apiKey.hint.withDefault: An API key is set in config/env. Leave unchanged to keep current value.
settings.apiUrl.label: API URL
settings.model.label: Model
settings.temperature.label: Temperature
settings.temperature.invalid: Temperature must be a number between 0 and 2
settings.customPrompt.label: Custom Prompt
settings.customPrompt.placeholder: Additional instructions appended to the system translation prompt
settings.localeMap.label: Locale Map
settings.localeMap.hint: JSON mapping locale codes to language names for better LLM prompts
settings.localeMap.invalid: Locale Map must be valid JSON
settings.llm.section: LLM PROVIDER OPTIONS — These settings only apply to LLM-based providers like OpenRouter
settings.save.provider-reload-failed: Settings saved but provider failed to reload
auto-translate.settings.description: Automatically translate content to all locales when saved or published in the master locale. Translations run in the background.
auto-translate.settings.enabled.label: Enable auto-translate on save
auto-translate.settings.masterLocale.hin: The source-of-truth locale. Only saves to this locale trigger auto-translation to all others.
auto-translate.settings.masterLocale.req: Master locale is required when auto-translate is enabled
auto-translate.logs.title: RECENT AUTO-TRANSLATIONS
